mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, equipment_id, equipment_name, rental_start_time, rental_end_time, actual_return_time, rental_hours, rental_price, total_amount, deposit, order_status, payment_status, payment_time, payment_method, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_rental_order WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_rental_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_rental_order (order_no, user_id, equipment_id, equipment_name, rental_start_time, rental_end_time, actual_return_time, rental_hours, rental_price, total_amount, deposit, order_status, payment_status, payment_time, payment_method) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentName}, #{rentalStartTime}, #{rentalEndTime}, #{actualReturnTime}, #{rentalHours}, #{rentalPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{deposit}, #{orderStatus}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentTime}, #{paymentMethod})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_rental_order
order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, rental_start_time = #{rentalStartTime}, rental_end_time = #{rentalEndTime}, actual_return_time = #{actualReturnTime}, rental_hours = #{rentalHours}, rental_price = #{rentalPrice}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, deposit = #{deposit}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_rental_order SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_rental_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_rental_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_rental_order WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_rental_order WHERE order_status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_rental_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_rental_order WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_rental_order SET order_status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_rental_order SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
